headline: How Parker-Hannifin Corporation’s (PH) Motion-Control Layer Anchors Its Automation Exposure
summary: Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) is one of the best industrial automation stocks to buy now. On June 30, Barron’s discussed Mizuho’s physical AI investment framework and included Parker-Hannifin among companies positioned in the component layer that supports automation. The angle is straightforward: robots, automated lines and smart machines still need motion, control, fluid handling and electromechanical […]
